This catalog is a body-free map of GitClaw's session inspection surface. It records which session commands exist, which commands need a fetched backup JSON, and which gates keep transcript recall inspectable without printing raw messages.

### Catalog Entries
- command=`catalog` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session catalog` local_command=`gitclaw session catalog` execution=`metadata-only` gate=`body-free-output` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`list` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session list` local_command=`gitclaw session list --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`hash-only-message-list` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`status` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session status` local_command=`gitclaw session status --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`latest-message-hashes` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`stats` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session stats` local_command=`gitclaw session stats --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`aggregate-counts-and-provenance` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`coverage` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session coverage` local_command=`gitclaw session coverage --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`model-skill-tool-provenance` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`risk` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session risk` local_command=`gitclaw session risk --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`prompt-boundary-and-marker-hygiene` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`
- command=`search` issue_intent=`@gitclaw /session search <query>` local_command=`gitclaw session search <query> --backup <issue.json>` execution=`current-issue-or-local-backup` gate=`query-hash-and-line-hash-metadata` raw_bodies_included=`false` mutation_allowed=`false`

### Catalog Gates
- issue_thread_gate=`canonical-session-is-github-issue-thread`
- local_backup_gate=`fetched-backup-json-required-for-local-transcript-inspection`
- raw_body_gate=`hashes-counts-and-metadata-only`
- search_gate=`query-hash-and-line-hash-metadata`
- coverage_gate=`prompt-provenance-skill-tool-telemetry`
- channel_boundary_gate=`provider-session-keys-collapse-to-canonical-github-issue`
